name: cc-design
description: High-fidelity HTML design skill for slide decks, landing pages, interactive prototypes, animations, and design systems.

interface.longDescription: Create slide decks, landing pages, interactive prototypes, animations, design systems, and export-ready visual artifacts with structured design planning and quality guardrails.
defaultPrompt: Design a landing page for this product.
Create a pitch deck from this outline.
Build an interactive prototype for this flow.
